changes.description: Wood panel background: replaced flat beige gradient with warm honey-brown SVG wood grain texture (#8B6914, #A0822A, #7A5A10). Three layers of grain lines. Darker vignette overlay.

Chunkier tile walls: tiles 20% bigger (W0.60 H0.78 D0.55), tighter spacing (0.015 gap), walls closer to center (±3.6), warmer beige/tan backs (#e0d4b0 gradient), brighter cream/ivory sides (0xe0d8bc), darker edge lines (0x6a5a4a, 0.8 opacity).
Bigger hand tiles: 64x84→82x108px, face font 36→46px, char-top 27→34px, char-bottom 22→28px. Hand tray padding/gap adjusted. Tiles now dominate bottom screen with large readable calligraphy.

Player avatars: Renamed Yuki→Keni with new qipao/cheongsam SVG portrait (bun, flower ornament, mandarin collar, frog button). Avatars 110→120px. Added 'PLAYER N' labels above each name. Player-label updated to 'PLAYER 4: Chen'.

Bold ink cloud wisps (雲): Replaced 2 barely-visible corner wisps with 6 spiral cloud groups positioned between tile walls and center. Dark brown ink (#3a2a18), alpha 0.70, lineWidth 5-7. Traditional 雲 spiral curls with flowing bezier wisps. Positions: N→center, S→center, E→center, W→center, NE diagonal, SW diagonal.
Bold header: title 20→30px, weight 600→800, color #3a3028→#2a2018 (darker), letter-spacing 3→4px, added text-shadow. Subtitle 12→14px, weight 500. Header now prominent and commanding above table.

Bigger toolbar buttons: 58→68px, border-radius 8→10px, warm beige gradient (f5ede0→ece2cf), golden border (#c0a878, 2px), icons 20→28px, labels 9→10px darker (#5a4a38), stronger hover shadow. Both top-right and bottom-right toolbars now more prominent.

Aged paper texture on table: procedural canvas texture with uneven base tone patches, 50k fine noise grain dots, 40k+ horizontal fiber strands, 200 visible wavy fiber lines, 10k cross-grain vertical fibers, 35 age/discoloration spots with multi-stop gradients, 20 foxing spots, and edge vignette darkening. Table now looks like old rice paper/parchment.

Bolder bamboo corners: stalks thicker (13→17 regular, 22 trunk), more stalks (6→8 left, 5→7 right), 2 thick trunk stalks per corner, leaves 30% bigger, more leaves (12→16 left, 10→14 right), reach higher (y=780→740), node lines thicker (7→9). Both corners now dominant ink-brush bamboo motifs.

Larger, well-organized center discards: scale 0.88→1.10 (25% bigger), zero rotation (was random ±0.04), zones ±1.2→±1.5 from center, spacing 0.52→0.58, rowSpacing 0.62→0.70. Discards now prominent and neatly arranged.

Rounded tile edges: replaced BoxGeometry with ExtrudeGeometry using rounded Shape (r=0.05). Bevel: 0.018 thickness/size, 3 segments. Stronger two-tone: face-up cream #f5ead8 / tan sides #b0986c. Face-down: muted #d8ccb0 / darker sides #a08860. Removed sharp EdgesGeometry lines and old bevel highlight mesh.

Boosted ink decoration visibility: Cloud wisps opacity 0.35→0.75, size 8→9.5, y 0.007→0.012. Bamboo corners: added opacity 0.85, size 3.0→3.8, y 0.006→0.011, positions ±3.5→±3.8. Both now clearly visible dark ink on cream table.

Bolder tile walls: warmer tan backs (0xc8b890), much darker brown sides (0x7a6038), side metalness 0.05, dark edge outlines via EdgesGeometry (0x4a3a28), scale 1.02, drop shadow planes beneath each wall section. Walls now THE dominant 3D element.

Even bigger hand tiles: 82x108→92x120px, face font 46→52px, char-top 34→38px, char-bottom 28→32px, tile-body radius 12→14px, face radius 10→12px. Hand tray padding 12px 18px. Responsive font bumped 36→40px. Tiles now THE dominant 2D element with large readable calligraphy.

notes: Iteration 14: Hand tiles now significantly larger and more visually dominant. All 10 deltas addressed, D refined twice (iter 3+14), C refined twice (iter 2+13). 1 iteration remaining. Game is highly polished — approaching mockup fidelity.
user_feedback: Tiles must have ROUNDED edges and corners like the mockup
Tiles need TWO-TONE look (cream face, darker sides)
Discard pile tiles must match player hand tiles exactly - consistent style
